facts.primaryTitle: The Save File Knew His Real Name
facts.setting: The cartridge had one save file.
criticalEvents: The cartridge had one save file.
It used Felix's childhood nickname—a name no one online knew.
Felix Grant was a software developer restoring an unlabelled game cartridge when the story began in a cramped apartment filled with retro game hardware.
The first reports did not describe an obvious monster or violent attack.
facts.threat: The cartridge had one save file.
facts.finalConsequence: The final warning is therefore simple: when the same impossible detail appears twice, do not wait for a third occurrence to prove that it is real.
facts.unresolvedQuestion: The next morning, the FELIX save file reads: CONTINUE?
